step_rationale: Cell-adhesion and integrin-signaling regulator in plaque inflammatory progression.
mechanism: LIMS1 modulates integrin signaling and cellular adhesion during plaque inflammation and leukocyte recruitment.

references.title: Identification of Key Genes as Early Warning Signals of Acute Myocardial Infarction Based on Weighted Gene Correlation Network Analysis and Dynamic Network Biomarker Algorithm.
